dimensions.name: Governance Awareness

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The transition from rule loading to 'conversation-to-aw' shows a logical progression. The high completion token count (5476) in the final reasoning span suggests a deep exploration of the architecture's causal structure.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The orchestration structure explicitly separates rule loading from workflow generation, which is a prerequisite for identifying trade-offs between requirements and constraints. Success in schema validation across complex prompts supports this.
